posting.sourceTitle: Area Sheet Metal Workers JATC LU#112 (Elmira)
posting.sponsorName: JATC for Area Sheet Metal Workers
posting.locationSummary: Elmira, NY; recruitment covers the Southern Tier and Western regions of New York
posting.applicationSummary: Obtain an application at the Elmira JATC office or download and print it from the website. Submit the completed application in person or by mail by February 28, 2027.
posting.applicationHours: 8:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m., Monday through Friday, excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma, such as TASC or GED.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have a valid NYS driver’s license, reliable transportation to work sites and required classes, and may be required to drive company vehicles.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a drug test, at the sponsor’s expense, after selection and before enrollment.
posting.classRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to required classes at the approved school and must attend 50% of all local union meetings each school year (September through August).
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma (such as TASC or GED).

Must sign an affidavit stating they are physically able to perform the work of a Sheet Metal Worker, including working with sharp objects, hazardous machinery, loud noises, respiratory irritants, prolonged standing/sitting/walking, squatting and bending repeatedly, working in severe weather and extreme temperatures, working in confined spaces, lifting or moving heavy objects and equipment up to 100 pounds, and working off ladders and scaffolds at heights that may exceed 50 feet.
Must have a valid NYS driver’s license; apprentices may be required to drive company vehicles.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various work sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must pass a drug test, at the expense of the sponsor, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must provide own hand tools as per the JATC LU 112 apprentices tool list, not to exceed $750.00.
Must have manual dexterity and multi-limb coordination.
Must be able to read, hear, speak, and understand verbal instructions and warnings given in English.
Must have visual color discrimination to match or detect colors, including shades and brightness.
Must be able to read, write, and understand verbal instructions and warnings given in English.
Must attend 50% of all local union meetings during each school year (September through August).
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have a high school diploma or equivalency, hold a valid NYS driver’s license, have reliable transportation, pass a sponsor-paid drug test, be bondable, and meet the physical, tool, English-language, and union meeting requirements.
posting.contactName: JATC for Area Sheet Metal Workers, Local Union #112
posting.contactSummary: For further information, contact JATC for Area Sheet Metal Workers, Local Union #112 at (607) 733-3732 or visit www.smw112.org.
